title: VStatsShow Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VStatsShow (Sequence As String, Parent As Form)
parameters:
Sequence	String expression
		 containing the name of a vision sequence in the current project.
description: Displays the vision statistics dialog for a specified sequence in the current project.
